title: Irans Crudecondensate Exports Reach Record High Under Sanctions
section_path: Irans Crudecondensate Exports Reach Record High Under Sanctions
section_path_text: Irans Crudecondensate Exports Reach Record High Under Sanctions
summary:
This insight explores Iran's record-high crude/condensate exports under sanctions, changes to floating storage and Russia's impact on Iranian fleet activity. By Armen Azizian
Ιran exported over 1.5mbd of crude/condensate in May, a 200kbd increase m-o-m and 400kbd above the 12-month average. This marks May as Iran's highest monthly crude/condensate exports total since sanctions were imposed in November 2018.
